observations.description: Sequentially drawn observations where 'b' denotes a defective item and 'g' denotes a good item, used in the sequential testing plan to determine acceptance or rejection of the lot.

p0.description: Proportion of defective items under the null hypothesis H0.

p1.description: Proportion of defective items under the alternative hypothesis H1.

alpha.description: Probability of rejecting H0 when it is true (Type I error probability), used to determine the sequential test boundaries.

beta.description: Probability of accepting H0 when H1 is true (Type II error probability), used to determine the sequential test boundaries.
